$comment: ENG-133 — Performance budgets. Bump baselines deliberately with the regressing PR; never silently. See docs/PERF-BUDGETS.md.

bundleSize.$comment: Per-chunk gzipped size ceiling in KB. Only chunks >= 5 KB gz are tracked here; smaller route splits and micro-icon chunks are noise. Chunk names strip the Rolldown content hash (e.g. SalesPage-Br3xY9Q_.js -> SalesPage).
bundleSize.$retune: ENG-170 — rebudgeted after build.rollupOptions manualChunks split pdf/xlsx/codemirror/dnd out of the entry. index dropped 320->~152 gz (gate-measured 151.79; ceiling 160 tightened to lock the win). exceljs.bare.min/jspdf.es.min/jspdf.plugin.autotable consolidated into xlsx/pdf. html2canvas is a real jspdf transitive (kept).
bundleSize.$retune2: Rediseno declutter+dedup — CompanyPage 22->30 (el nuevo company hub absorbe AI/shared sync/cards y gate-measured queda en 29.77kB gz; CompanySyncCard ya no produce artefacto separado). OperationsPage 14->16 por el SyncHealthPanel propio + pv diff/KPI icons (gate-measured 16.02kB gz, dentro del 5% threshold). usePaginatedRows/TablePagination son chunks compartidos sin overshoot propio.
bundleSize.$retune3: ENG-170b — lazy i18n namespaces. The 30 non-bootstrap locale namespaces left the entry as their own dynamic-import chunks (fiscal/kds/aiSettings/... two per ns for en+es). The gate-measured index chunk is 152.75 KB gz after the split, so the ceiling tightens 160->153 to pin the real build output. The per-namespace chunks are < 5 KB gz each so they ride the gate's untracked-chunk warning, not the budget.
bundleSize.$retune4: ENG-172 — DataTable row virtualisation adds @tanstack/react-virtual (~4 KB gz) to the shared table chunk (TableLoadingState, which carries DataTable + @tanstack/react-table). Gate-measured 21.17 KB gz after the dep lands, so the ceiling lifts 17->22 to pin the real output. No other tracked chunk moved; the index entry is unchanged.
bundleSize.$retune5: ENG-187 — OperationsPage now owns the default needs-attention panel (tRPC query state, empty/error/loading states, and review CTAs). Gate-measured 16.86 KB gz after the route became the default attention queue, so the ceiling lifts 16->17 to pin the shipped route payload within the 5% threshold.

trpcLatencyMs.$comment: p95 latency budget in milliseconds for a curated set of tRPC procedures. CI runs warmupIterations warmups then samplesPerProcedure measurements, computes p95, and asserts it falls within budget * (1 + thresholdPercent/100). Bias the procedure list toward routes the operator opens repeatedly during the day.

electronMemoryMb.$comment: ENG-133b — Electron main + renderer working-set ceiling in MB, measured via app.getAppMetrics() by scripts/check-electron-memory.mjs (PUNTOVIVO_MEASURE_MEMORY mode). Phase 1 is warn-first: the gate prints the report but never fails the build (pass --strict / PUNTOVIVO_MEMORY_STRICT=1 to enforce). It also self-skips when Electron cannot launch (no .vite/build bundle / no display), so ci:desktop stays green on ubuntu until the xvfb CI-launch hardening lands. Baselines captured from a real local run; bump deliberately with the regressing PR.
electronMemoryMb.$baseline: ENG-133b — captured locally (macOS, renderer served by dev:web): main ~250-258 MB, renderer ~159-160 MB across runs. Baselines set just above the observed max; the 25% threshold absorbs run-to-run working-set variance in the warn-first phase.
